cmd.diagnose.title: **System Diagnostics**
status.title: **Status**
session.reset.title: **Session Reset**
session.reset.body:
Session reset for {provider} in this chat only.
Other provider sessions were preserved.
Send a message to continue.
session.error.title: **Session Error**
session.error.body:
[{model}] An error occurred.
Your session has been preserved -- send another message to retry.
Use /new to start a fresh session if the problem persists.
session.error.auth: Authentication failed. Please re-authenticate the CLI (e.g. `codex auth` or check your API key).
session.error.rate_limit: Rate limit reached. Wait a moment and try again.
session.error.context: Context length exceeded. Use /new to start a fresh session.
timeout.title: **Timeout**
timeout.body:
[{model}] CLI was terminated after {minutes} min.
Your session has been preserved -- send another message to continue where it left off.
Use /new to start a fresh session.
timeout.result:
The agent timed out after {elapsed}s (limit: {limit}s).
Try a shorter prompt, or ask in smaller steps.
stop.title: **Agent Stopped**
startup.first_start.title: **Bot Started**
startup.reboot.title: **Bot Started**
recovery.named.title: **Auto-Recovery**
recovery.interrupted.title: **Interrupted Task**
recovery.interrupted.body:

cron.selector.already_disabled: All cron jobs were already disabled.
cron.selector.stale: Cron list changed. Please try again.

model.selector.title: **Model Selector**
model.selector.no_auth:
No authenticated providers found.
Run `claude auth`, `codex auth`, or authenticate in `gemini` to get started.
model.selector.no_gemini_models: No Gemini models discovered from local Gemini CLI files.
model.selector.opencode_hint: OpenCode models use provider/model format (e.g. `anthropic/claude-sonnet-4`). Set via `@provider/model` in chat.
model.selector.resume_hint:
Resuming session `{session_id}`.
You have already sent {count} {label} in this provider session.
Current model: `{model}`.
Use /new to start a fresh session.
